en.question: A shopkeeper buys a product for Rs. 500 and sells it for Rs. 600. What is the profit percentage?

hi.question: एक दुकानदार Rs. 500 में एक वस्तु खरीदता है और Rs. 600 में बेचता है। लाभ प्रतिशत क्या है?

en.question: By selling an article at Rs. 720, a man loses 10%. At what price should he sell it to gain 10%?

hi.question: एक वस्तु को Rs. 720 में बेचने पर एक व्यक्ति को 10% की हानि होती है। 10% लाभ प्राप्त करने के लिए उसे किस मूल्य पर बेचना चाहिए?

en.question: A fruit seller bought oranges at 6 for Rs. 10 and sold them at 4 for Rs. 10. Find his profit percentage.

hi.question: एक फल विक्रेता ने 6 संतरे Rs. 10 में खरीदे और 4 संतरे Rs. 10 में बेचे। उसका लाभ प्रतिशत ज्ञात करें।

en.question: A trader marks his goods 40% above cost price and gives a discount of 10%. What is his profit percentage?
en.explanation: Let CP = 100. MP = 140. After 10% discount, SP = 140 x 0.9 = 126. Profit = 26%.

hi.question: एक व्यापारी अपनी वस्तुओं पर क्रय मूल्य से 40% अधिक अंकित करता है और 10% की छूट देता है। उसका लाभ प्रतिशत क्या है?

en.question: A shopkeeper offers a discount of 20% on the marked price and still makes a profit of 12%. If the cost price is Rs. 500, what is the marked price?
en.explanation: SP = 500 x 1.12 = 560. After 20% discount, SP = 0.8 x MP. So MP = 560/0.8 = 700.

hi.question: एक दुकानदार अंकित मूल्य पर 20% की छूट देता है और फिर भी 12% का लाभ कमाता है। यदि क्रय मूल्य Rs. 500 है, तो अंकित मूल्य क्या है?

en.question: A person sells an article at 20% profit. Had he bought it at 20% less and sold it for Rs. 75 less, he would have gained 25%. Find the cost price.
en.explanation: Let CP = x. Original SP = 1.2x. New CP = 0.8x. New SP = 1.2x - 75. For 25% profit on new CP: new SP = 1.25 x 0.8x = x. So 1.2x - 75 = x. 0.2x = 75, x = 375.

hi.question: एक व्यक्ति 20% लाभ पर एक वस्तु बेचता है। यदि वह इसे 20% कम में खरीदता और Rs. 75 कम में बेचता, तो उसे 25% का लाभ होता। क्रय मूल्य ज्ञात करें।
hi.explanation: माना क्रय मूल्य = x। मूल विक्रय मूल्य = 1.2x। नया क्रय मूल्य = 0.8x। नया विक्रय मूल्य = 1.2x - 75। नए क्रय मूल्य पर 25% लाभ: नया विक्रय मूल्य = 1.25 × 0.8x = x। इसलिए 1.2x - 75 = x। 0.2x = 75, x = 375।

en.question: A shopkeeper sold two watches at Rs. 720 each. On one he gained 20% and on the other he lost 20%. What is his overall gain or loss percentage?
en.explanation: When two articles are sold at same SP with equal % gain and loss, overall loss % = (x^2)/100 = 20^2/100 = 4% loss.

hi.question: एक दुकानदार ने दो घड़ियां Rs. 720 प्रति घड़ी बेचीं। एक पर उसे 20% लाभ और दूसरी पर 20% हानि हुई। कुल लाभ या हानि प्रतिशत क्या है?
hi.explanation: जब दो वस्तुएं समान विक्रय मूल्य पर समान % लाभ और हानि के साथ बेची जाती हैं, तो कुल हानि % = (x^2)/100 = 20^2/100 = 4% हानि।

en.question: A dishonest dealer claims to sell goods at cost price but uses a weight of 900 g instead of 1 kg. What is his profit percentage?

hi.question: एक बेईमान विक्रेता क्रय मूल्य पर सामान बेचने का दावा करता है लेकिन 1 kg के बजाय 900 g का बाट उपयोग करता है। उसका लाभ प्रतिशत क्या है?

en.question: The marked price of an article is 50% above cost price. What maximum discount can be offered to still make a profit of 20%?

hi.question: एक वस्तु का अंकित मूल्य क्रय मूल्य से 50% अधिक है। 20% लाभ कमाने के लिए अधिकतम कितनी छूट दी जा सकती है?

en.question: SI on Rs.25000 at 29% for 18 yrs?
A does work in 11d, B in 17d. Together?
SI on Rs.40000 at 25% for 21 yrs?
SI on Rs.24000 at 6% for 37 yrs?
A does work in 20d, B in 35d. Together?
SI on Rs.21000 at 11% for 8 yrs?
Buy Rs.430, sell at 10% profit. SP?
Buy Rs.250, sell at 21% profit. SP?
A does work in 39d, B in 31d. Together?
Buy Rs.90, sell at 12% profit. SP?
A does work in 18d, B in 6d. Together?
Buy Rs.370, sell at 25% profit. SP?
SI on Rs.5000 at 12% for 22 yrs?
